entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop characterized by high starch and protein levels, grown in Tanzania

entities.name: STARCH CONTENT
entities.description: The high composition of starch in sorghum providing energy

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The high levels of protein found in sorghum compared to other cereals

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A cereal crop used as a comparison for protein levels against sorghum

entities.name: TANZANIA
entities.description: The country where the sorghum production system is studied

entities.name: CENTRAL ZONE
entities.description: A region in Tanzania where sorghum production is dominant

entities.name: LAKE ZONE
entities.description: A region in Tanzania where sorghum production is dominant

entities.name: WESTERN ZONE
entities.description: A region in Tanzania where sorghum production is dominant

entities.name: SEMI-ARID AREAS
entities.description: Environmental regions characterized by limited rainfall and drought

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A period of abnormally dry weather that is a characteristic of sorghum-growing regions in Tanzania

entities.name: SHORT RAINFALL DURATION
entities.description: A characteristic of the climate in sorghum-growing regions in Tanzania

entities.name: ERRATIC RAINS
entities.description: Unreliable and unpredictable rainfall patterns in sorghum-growing regions in Tanzania

entities.name: CROP FAILURE
entities.description: The loss of crops resulting from adverse environmental conditions

entities.name: FOOD SHORTAGE
entities.description: A deficiency in the quantity and quality of food due to crop failure

entities.name: UNSTABLE GRAIN PRICES
entities.description: Fluctuations in the market price of grains caused by food shortages

entities.name: IMPROVED SORGHUM VARIETIES
entities.description: Newly released sorghum varieties developed for higher yields and stress tolerance

entities.name: HIGH YIELD
entities.description: The ability to produce a high amount of grain, ranging from 2.0 to 3.5 ton/ha

entities.name: PEST RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to resist attack by pests

entities.name: STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability to grow under adverse conditions, specifically 0-1500m altitude and 300-1500mm rainfall

entities.name: MATURITY PERIOD
entities.description: The time taken for the crop to reach maturity, specifically 100 to 120 days

entities.name: STRIGA
entities.description: A parasitic weed that causes infestation in sorghum crops

entities.name: STRIGA TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of improved sorghum varieties to tolerate infestation by Striga

entities.name: NUTRIENT CONTENT
entities.description: The level of essential nutrients in the grain to address malnutrition

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A health condition resulting from poor nutrient intake, addressed by improved sorghum varieties
